dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition: Falling volume trend approximated as current volume less than previous bar volume. Exit condition: Volume reversal (volume above SMA_20) indicates breakout completion or pattern failure. Success rate 39% (bull) informed stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max. AEDB pattern recognition itself is not quantifiable from allowed indicators, so volume trend is the primary measurable entry signal.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition: Falling volume trend approximated as current volume less than previous bar volume. Exit condition: Volume reversal (volume above SMA_20) indicates breakout completion or pattern failure. Success rate 39% (bull) informed stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max. AEDB pattern recognition itself is not quantifiable from allowed indicators, so volume trend is the primary measurable entry signal.

source_rule_text: Falling volume trend in AEDB pattern: Volume declines as price forms the pattern
